rule-node-config.message-template @if (slackConfigForm.get('messageTemplate').hasError('required')) { {{ 'rule-node-config.message-template-required' | translate }} } rule-node-config.general-pattern-hint {{ 'rule-node-config.use-system-slack-settings' | translate }} @if (!slackConfigForm.get('useSystemSettings').value) { rule-node-config.slack-api-token @if (slackConfigForm.get('botToken').hasError('required')) { {{ 'rule-node-config.slack-api-token-required' | translate }} } } @for (slackChanelType of slackChanelTypes; track slackChanelType) { {{ slackChanelTypesTranslateMap.get(slackChanelType) | translate }} }
